description_long: This is a rectangular, upright carton with a predominantly white and gold color scheme, featuring the brand name 'Faragello Gold' and the product description 'Premium Guava Nectar' on the front. The front face displays a realistic illustration of a yellow guava fruit, emphasizing the product's flavor. The top of the carton is fitted with a white, screw-on cap for dispensing the contents, and the cap is positioned off-center. One side of the carton displays the brand name 'FARAGELLO' vertically, along with additional product information. The back of the carton contains detailed nutritional facts and multilingual text, typical of commercial beverage packaging. The overall surface is smooth and glossy, with clear, high-quality printed graphics.
description: A white and gold rectangular carton labeled 'Faragello Gold' with a guava fruit illustration and a white screw-on cap. The packaging is glossy, with detailed branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'Faragello Gold' branding, a large guava fruit illustration, and the product name 'Premium Guava Nectar'.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and a gold panel, with part of the cap visible at the top.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed nutritional facts, multilingual text, and a small brand logo at the bottom.
description_view_3: This side view shows the gold panel, partial product name, and the white screw-on cap from a different angle.
